name: pingpt-extension
description: Pin individual ChatGPT messages or entire chats. Add custom names and tags, search instantly, and jump back to the original conversation. Features dark mode support and ultra-fast serverless API powered by Hono.

scripts.copy:frontend-icons: mkdirp frontend/images && cpx "assets/icons/favicon-*.png" frontend/images && cpx "assets/icons/favicon.ico" frontend/images
scripts.prebuild: npm run clean && run-p build:assets copy:icons
scripts.build:extension: npm run prebuild && run-p build:chrome build:firefox
scripts.pack: npm run build:extension && npm run pack:all
